Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.

JusBrasil.title: JusBrasil
JusBrasil.description: Case-law and docket search/aggregation platform — jurisprudência dos tribunais, andamentos processuais, diários oficiais, e verificação de citações. [verify endpoint against actual JusBrasil developer docs before production use]

Escavador.title: Escavador
Escavador.description: Primary law research — busca de processos por partes/OAB, jurisprudência, extração de movimentações e decisões, verificação de andamento. [verify endpoint against actual Escavador developer docs before production use]

PJe.title: PJe (Processo Judicial eletrônico)
PJe.description: Direct access to a tribunal's PJe instance for docket/movimentação lookups. Each tribunal (TJ, TRF, TST, etc.) runs its own separate PJe deployment — there is no single unified PJe endpoint; point this at the specific tribunal instance(s) the clinic needs. [verify endpoint per tribunal before production use]
